name: antigravity
description: Antigravity CLI: Agentic Coding Assistant. Primary coding agent — EDIT and EXECUTE class. Brings the core capabilities of Antigravity 2.0 (multi-step reasoning, multi-file editing, tool calling) directly to the terminal, optimized for speed, keyboard-first workflows, and remote SSH sessions.

system_keyring.description: Authenticates via system keyring or Google Sign-In

skills.name: Agentic Coding
skills.description: Understands the codebase, makes edits with user permission, and executes commands.
